implementation_summary: Updated three existing test assertions to match the new call signature: `data=None, params=None` for GET with empty method_arguments (empty dict evaluates to None via `method_args or None`). Added two regression tests: `test_get_request_passes_method_arguments_as_url_params` verifies non-empty GET args go into params=; `test_post_request_passes_method_arguments_as_json_body` verifies POST args go into data= as JSON.
